Because of the arrangement of the pumps, you can't see which one is free when you're in line.

reviews.comment:
Esta estación de servicios queda a 4 cuadras de mi trabajo por lo que regularmente cargo ahí... No entiendo porque son muy lentos para atender, siempre que voy aunque tenga un solo auto adelante mío, tardo más de 20 minutos

(Translated by Google)
This gas station is four blocks from my work, so I regularly fill up there. I don't understand why they're so slow; every time I go, even if there's only one car ahead of me, it takes me more than 20 minutes.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURnNThiNEZREAE

reviews.comment:
muy buena atencion y terminaron los arreglos y quedo renovado!

(Translated by Google)

reviews.comment:
Muy buena estación. Tiene cocheras en el 1er piso para autos y motos, confiteria y taller.

(Translated by Google)
Very good station. It has parking on the first floor for cars and motorcycles, a café, and a repair shop.
